name: A Counterfactual Cause in Situation Calculus
summary: arXiv:2501.06857v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Perhaps the most popular modern formulation of actual causality is the HP account by Halpern and Pearl. Recent advancement has focused on extensi...
description: arXiv:2501.06857v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Perhaps the most popular modern formulation of actual causality is the HP account by Halpern and Pearl. Recent advancement has focused on extension of HP account to lift its limited expressiveness, in particular, Batusov and Soutchanski proposed a notion of actual achievement cause in the situation calculus, a rich first-order formalism of act...
author: Daxin Liu (Nanjing University), Vaishak Belle (The University of Edinburgh)
